subcodes.first_line: A luminous remembrance from the servant unto him who hath believed in God and hath been guided by the Sun that shone forth from the horizon of the Spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر منیر من العبد الی الذی آمن بالله ثم اهتدی بشمس التی کانت عن افق الروح
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
